new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverage quality (aniseed, raki, mezcal, herb, bitters, aquavit, root spirits, sorghum, lees)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Branntwein-Qualität (Anis, Raki, Mezcal, Kräuter, Magenbitter, Aquavit, Wurzeln, Sorghum, Hefebrand)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by spirituous beverages that do not fall under any other specifically enumerated CN 2208 subheading, including aniseed spirits, raki, agave spirits other than tequila (e.g. mezcal), spirits distilled from aromatic herbs, digestive bitters, aquavit, kranawitter, spirits distilled from roots (e.g. gentian spirits), sorghum spirits, and Hefebrand or lees spirit.

new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverages (other), in containers holding ≤ 2 l (CN 2208 90 56)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Branntwein (anderer), in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger (KN 2208 90 56)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages of CN heading 2208 90 that are not arrack, plum/pear/cherry spirit, other fruit spirit, or liqueur, presented in containers of 2 litres or less. Includes aniseed spirits, raki, agave spirits other than tequila (e.g. mezcal), spirits distilled from aromatic herbs, digestive bitters, aquavit, kranawitter, spirits distilled from roots (e.g. gentian spirits), sorghum spirits, Hefebrand or lees spirit.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the key discriminating criteria for CN 2208 90 56: (1) the product is a spirituous beverage under heading 2208 90 that does not fall under any other specifically enumerated subheading (arrack, plum/pear/cherry spirit, other fruit spirit, liqueur), and (2) it is presented in containers ≤ 2 l. The new OtherSpiritousQuality class carries the enumerated examples (aniseed spirits, raki, mezcal, herb spirits, bitters, aquavit, kranawitter, root spirits, sorghum spirits, Hefebrand/lees spirit) in its definition. Coverage is slightly below 1.0 because: (a) the full exhaustive list of excluded sibling subheadings (e.g. whisky, rum, vodka, gin subheadings) is not individually expressed as complement restrictions — only the most closely competing 2208 90 siblings are excluded; (b) no explicit undenatured ethyl alcohol < 80% vol quality restriction is added, though this is implicitly inherited from the parent class SpiritsLiqueursOtherSpiritousBeverages2208. Individual sub-type qualities for each example spirit type (raki, mezcal, etc.) are not separately modelled, as the legal note presents them as exemplary rather than exhaustive subcategories.
